full_text:
We received a large piece of healthy-looking omentum. The piece was divided in two parts and one was dissociated according to the protocol. For that one, finely minced pieces were dissociated in 20 mL of Dispase + RQ1-RNAse free DNAse diluted in AdDF+++ medium. The obtained pellet was small and bloody so red blood cell lysis was performed with 4 mL of RBC lysis buffer. Afterwards, the resulting pellet was resuspended in 1 mL of complete iPDC media (with cytokines)

Cell count 1):

total: 2.98 E6/mL

live: 2.22 E6/mL

viability: 74.5 %

Size: 7.5 um

Cell count 2):

total: 2.57 E6/mL

live: 1.89 E6/mL

viability: 73.4 %

Size: 8.0 um

Average cell count: 2.775 E6 / mL

Total volume: 1 mL

Final cell count: 2.775 E6 cells

A) Flow cytometry 49 well plate

8 conditions, 6 replicates/condition = 48 wells

48 wells * 40 uL = uL -> 1920 uL -> 2200 uL

Since the omentum gel start polymerizing as soon as the aprotinin is added, it is better to make four

separate tubes each one of 550 uL (approx. 2200 uL/4) and not everything at once in a single tube.

We want to keep a cell density of 1000 cells/uL, so the total number of cells per tube that will be needed is: 1000 cells/uL * 550 uL = 0.55E6 cells/tube

0.55E6 cells / (2.775E6 cells/mL) = 0.1982 mL = 198.2 uL (from the original cell suspension)

The amount of the remaining components per tube will be:

ORG full medium: (550 uL – 292.8 uL) = 257.2 uL

Omentum gel: 80.3

Aprotinin: 1.65

Thrombin: 1.65

Fibrinogen: 11

NOTE: Fibrinogen should be added just before pipetting to the wells. So, add everything to all 4 tubes except Fibrinogen. When you are ready to pipette add Fibrinogen one by one to each tube.

→ I Let it solidify for 30 min - then, I added 350 µl full ORG medium

→ Drugs will be added next day

C) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ one vial with the leftover cells was collected and stained with the antibodies from the drug testing panel according to the protocol.

C) Sample for cryo

As there were no cells left after culturing and flow cytometry, cells were not frozen.

Day 1 - Drug testing (Flow cytometry):

Prepare the stocks for drug testing in a 48 well plate as follows:

Prepare 9X stocks of each of the drugs so that 50 uL of each drug are added in the corresponding well. Final total volume per well after adding the drugs should be 450 uL. For example, for a layout like the following, the amounts to add of each liquid are indicated below:

End point ( day 4 / day 3 of drug treatment)

On day 3 of the drug-treatment, the cells were harvested for flow cytometry

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.1 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.146
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
